results.title: Moalboal improves to 4–0 in Calderon Cup women’s volleyball tilt
results.description: CEBU CITY, Philippines — The Municipality of Moalboal continued its dominant run in the inaugural Calderon Cup 21-Under Inter-Municipalities Women’s Volleyball Tournament, sweeping Badian and Dumanjug to extend its unbeaten streak to four matches on Saturday, May 23, in Badian, southern Cebu. With a 4–0 record, Moalboal tightened its grip on the solo lead of

results.title: Toledo makes PCAP All-Filipino Conference southern group finals
results.description: The Toledo Xignex Trojans punched their return ticket to the Professional Chess Association of the Philippines (PCAP) All-Filipino Conference Southern Division Finals after sweeping the Cavite Spartans in dominant fashion on Saturday night, May 23.

results.title: Gulveer Singh shatters national record in men’s 5000m with silver at Sound Running LA Track Fest
results.description: Gulveer Singh is the first Indian distance runner to hold multiple national records across events ranging from the 3,000m on the track to the 25km road race.
